Id1.text: St Vincent-St Mary High School is the ground of Akron Summit Assault who play in the Premier Development League, of which K-W United FC have been champions.

Id2.text: Akron Summit Assault who play in the Premier Development League, won by K-W United FC, have their home ground at St. Vincent-St. Mary High School.
